Mercari

Mercari is great for sourcing: they offer coupons, boast a HUGE marketplace full of people and items, and for the most part whatever you buy is shipped right to your door (if not ubered).

Mercari

Mercari also has a no-contact local buying option where Uber delivers the item direct to your door. Usually same or next day.

Mercari

Mercari is one of my personal favorite online sales marketplaces. Mercari offers local and shippnig sales/purchases and also gives out coupons for a % off an item of your choice often.

A Smart Reseller's Thrifting & Secondhand Sourcing Fieldbook

Thrifting has been a hobby of mine since I was a very young kid. I remember being maybe 12 years old going to my local thrift store and buying books from the 10/$1 sale to resell online and making BUCK on them. Nowadays, thrifting is simultaneously easier and more difficult. Smartphones and the internet have revolutionized resale & sourcing. Follow along for my tips and tricks to make the most of your resources as a new reseller. &nbsp;I may receive commission from the products linked here and elsewhere on my page

54

Slim, Velvet Non-Slip Hangers

My number one tip to create space and calm in your closet – use matching skinny hangers. They really make a difference! The metal hooks glide smoothly on a closet rod – so much better than plastic hangers.

Shelf Dividers

Keep items neatly contained on a shelf – folded clothes, linens, floppy bags and backpacks, etc. Separate different types of items stored on one shelf. A finishing touch that really makes a difference. For shelves .75″ – .95″ thick.

Silver Mesh Stackable Shoe Shelf. The Container Store

There are zillions of shoe shelves out there. This is one of my favorites. The sturdy metal mesh lets you see the shoes below and ensures shoes don't fall through - no tricky balancing of high heels on skinny bars.. They stack easily and securely, no tools or skills required. Pro tip: line up your shoes toe to heel and you may be able to fit more on a shelf. 31" long, 7.5" high beneath the shelf.

Yvette Idiou

15

The exquisite Swakopmund Strand Hotel.

We spend the best times of our summers relaxing on the beach with umbrellas, building sandcastles with the children and soaking up the sun. Some of the fun activities enjoyed by visitors is rowing on the waves, play park for the kids, swimming in the ocean, taking walks along the beach, volley ball and let's not forget the most important part indulging in the variety of delicious dishes Namibia has to offer.

Dining Experiences

When you visit Swakopmund you are guaranteed a memorable and tasteful dining experience one of my go to restaurant to visit is the Strand Hotel it has a variety of dishes to pick from as well as buffets. The ambience and decor make this place one for the books.

Desert Explorers | Unforgettable experience

If you are looking for a thrill of an experience try quad biking next time you visit Swakopmund. Mixed with beautiful scenes of the dunes and the sea you can't go wrong.

See all 15 recs

View List
Swakopmund, Home sweet home

Swakopmund is a little piece of heaven tucked away in northwest Africa in a country called Namibia where sand meets sea. Endless breath - taking sunsets and smiling sun rises. If you visit this little paradise, here are my some of my favorite things to do near my hometown.

This is unlike any other moisturizing face mask! All natural ingredients! Cheaper alternative to other snail products out there, and this stuff really helps rebuild your skin barrier!

Mermaid Moisture Hydrating Cleanser

My skin loves this! Use it when you want a little more from your nightly cleanser!

Acne Exfoliating Toner - Peach Slices

I am obsessed with this! I began applying it once daily twice a week. By the time I worked up to applying it once a day, my skin was already changing. My pores felt so much cleaner and I was no longer a grease ball by the end of the day! I saw purging within the first few weeks, but my skin ended up better than before this toner was introduced! I love it and recommend it to anyone dealing with skin texture issues.

Introducing the products that genuinely saved my skin!

Skincare is a passion that has always intrigued me. However, it used to be nothing more than a frustrating topic. The struggles I've had with my skin have been discouraging and quite embarrassing! I went from painful cystic acne to very textured and damaged skin. At different stages throughout my journey, I began implementing the products listed. These products are all ones I absolutely recommend to anyone struggling with acne - prone skin.
